description: Enable TypeScript strict mode and avoid using 'any' types.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - TypeScript strict mode enabled — no `any` types.

description: All API responses must adhere to the JSend specification.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - All API responses follow the JSend spec: `{ status, data, message }`.

description: Document error codes in the specified file.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - Error codes are documented in `docs/error-codes.md`.

description: Refactoring of PaymentService requires explicit approval due to Stripe webhook handling.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - **PaymentService** — handles Stripe webhooks. Do NOT refactor without explicit approval.

description: Changes to AuthMiddleware require a security review due to JWT validation logic.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - **AuthMiddleware** — JWT validation logic. Changes here require a security review.

description: Limit memory usage to 512 MB per container.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - The hosting provider limits memory to 512 MB per container.

description: Cold start time must not exceed 3 seconds, avoiding heavy synchronous imports.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - Cold start time must stay under 3 seconds; avoid heavy synchronous imports.

description: Wrap external API calls with a retry mechanism, allowing a maximum of 3 attempts.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - External API calls must be wrapped with a retry mechanism (max 3 attempts).

description: Place all user-facing strings in the specified Hebrew and English locale files.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - All user-facing strings must be placed in `locales/he.json` (Hebrew) and `locales/en.json`.

description: Set the default locale to Hebrew.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - The default locale is Hebrew (`he`).

description: Format dates using DD/MM/YYYY for display and ISO 8601 for storage.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - Date formatting: `DD/MM/YYYY` for display, ISO 8601 for storage.

description: Maintain a minimum unit-test coverage of 80%.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - Minimum unit-test coverage: 80%.

description: Integration tests are located in the specified directory.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - Integration tests live in `src/__tests__/integration/`.

description: Mock all third-party HTTP calls during testing to avoid hitting real APIs.
title: Claude Code Instructions
raw_text: - Mock all third-party HTTP calls; never hit real APIs in tests.

description: Use UUIDs for primary keys in the 'invoices' and 'invoice_line_items' tables.
title: Database Changes
raw_text:
- New table `invoices`:
  ```
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY
  user_id       UUID REFERENCES users(id)
  project_id    UUID REFERENCES projects(id)
  invoice_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE
  issued_at

description: Create a new table 'invoice_line_items' to store line items for each invoice.
title: Database Changes
raw_text:
- New table `invoice_line_items`:
  ```
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY
  invoice_id    UUID REFERENCES invoices(id)
  description   TEXT
  quantity      DECIMAL(10,2)
  unit_price_ils DECIMAL(10,2)

description: Invoice number format: `INV-{YYYY}-{sequential 5-digit number}`
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: 4. Invoice number format: `INV-{YYYY}-{sequential 5-digit number}`, e.g. `INV-2026-00042`.

description: Invoices must be immutable once issued.
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: 5. Invoices are immutable once issued — no editing allowed.

description: PDF generation must complete within 5 seconds.
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: - PDF generation must complete within 5 seconds.

description: Invoice PDFs should be stored in S3 with a specific path structure.
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: - Invoice PDFs stored in S3 under `invoices/{user_id}/{invoice_id}.pdf`.

description: Schema design for the new 'invoices' and 'invoice_line_items' tables has been approved.
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: - [x] Schema design approved

description: PDF generation library selection is pending (options: Puppeteer, PDFKit).
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: - [ ] PDF generation library selected (candidates: Puppeteer, PDFKit)

description: Implementation of the invoice generation feature is in progress.
title: Feature Spec: Invoice Generation
raw_text: - [ ] Implementation in progress

description: All UI components must support right-to-left layout.
title: RTL & Localisation
raw_text: All UI components MUST support RTL layout.

description: Hebrew is the primary language, with English as secondary.
title: RTL & Localisation
raw_text: Hebrew is the primary language; English is secondary.

description: Currency should be displayed with the Israeli Shekel symbol prefix.
title: RTL & Localisation
raw_text: Currency display: ₪ prefix, e.g. `₪1,250.00`.

description: Frontend framework is Next.js 14 with App Router.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Frontend**: Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

description: TypeScript is used for type safety.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Frontend**: Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

description: Tailwind CSS is the styling framework.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Frontend**: Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

description: Node.js is the backend runtime.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Prisma ORM

description: Express.js is used for backend routing.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Prisma ORM

description: Prisma ORM is used for database interactions.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Prisma ORM

description: PostgreSQL 15 is the database.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Database**: PostgreSQL 15

description: NextAuth.js is used for authentication with Google and Email providers.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Auth**: NextAuth.js with Google + Email providers

description: Stripe is integrated for payments in Israeli Shekels.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Payments**: Stripe (Israeli Shekel, NIS ₪)

description: AWS S3 is used for file storage.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **File storage**: AWS S3

description: Resend is used for email services.
title: Technology Stack
raw_text: - **Email**: Resend

description: Added `archived_at` column to the Projects table on December 10, 2025.
title: Database Schema Notes
raw_text: - Projects table: added `archived_at` column on 2025-12-10.

description: Added `priority` ENUM field to the Tasks table on January 15, 2026.
title: Database Schema Notes
raw_text: - Tasks table: added `priority` ENUM (`low`, `medium`, `high`, `critical`) on 2026-01-15.

description: Migrated `duration_minutes` field to `duration_seconds` in Time entries table on February 1, 2026.
title: Database Schema Notes
raw_text: - Time entries table: `duration_seconds` replaces the old `duration_minutes` field (migration run 2026-02-01).

description: Set container memory limit to 512 MB as per hosting provider's enforcement.
title: Kiro Steering — Technical Constraints
raw_text: - Container memory limit: 512 MB (enforced by hosting provider).

description: Limit maximum concurrent Dctions to 20 using PgBouncer pool.
title: Infrastructure Limits
raw_text: - Max concurrent Dctions: 20 (PgBouncer pool).

description: Set CDN asset max size to 5 MB per file.
title: Infrastructure Limits
raw_text: - CDN asset max size: 5 MB per file.

description: Set API p95 response time target to 300 ms or less.
title: Performance Requirements
raw_text: - API p95 response time: ≤ 300 ms.

description: Ensure initial page load (LCP) is 2.5 seconds or less on 4G.
title: Performance Requirements
raw_text: - Initial page load (LCP): ≤ 2.5 s on 4G.

description: Cold start should be 3 seconds or less, avoiding synchronous heavy imports at module level.
title: Performance Requirements
raw_text: - Cold start: ≤ 3 s (no synchronous heavy imports at module level).

description: Use Zod schemas for input validation, avoiding manual parsing.
title: Security Rules
raw_text: - All inputs validated with Zod schemas — no manual parsing.

description: Hash passwords with bcrypt using a cost factor of 12.
title: Security Rules
raw_text: - Passwords hashed with bcrypt, cost factor 12.

description: Set JWT token expiration to 1 hour and refresh tokens to 30 days.
title: Security Rules
raw_text: - JWT tokens expire after 1 hour; refresh tokens after 30 days.

description: Implement rate limiting of 100 requests per minute per IP on public endpoints.
title: Security Rules
raw_text: - Rate limiting: 100 requests / minute per IP on public endpoints.

description: Verify Stripe webhooks using `stripe.webhooks.constructEvent`.
title: Third-Party API Constraints
raw_text: - Stripe webhooks must be verified with `stripe.webhooks.constructEvent`.

description: Wrap all external HTTP calls in retry logic with 3 attempts and exponential back-off.
title: Third-Party API Constraints
raw_text: - All external HTTP calls wrapped in retry logic: 3 attempts, exponential back-off.

description: Set AWS S3 presigned URLs to expire after 15 minutes.
title: Third-Party API Constraints
raw_text: - AWS S3 presigned URLs expire after 15 minutes.

description: The `ReportingService` has performance issues with large datasets (>10k rows), tracked in issue #342. Avoid adding new queries until fixed.
title: Known Technical Debt
raw_text:
- The `ReportingService` has a performance issue with large datasets (>10k rows). 
  Tracked in issue #342. Avoid adding new queries to it until fixed.

description: Legacy `v1` REST API routes are still active for mobile app backwards compatibility, planned for deprecation in Q3 2026.
title: Known Technical Debt
raw_text:
- Legacy `v1` REST API routes still active for mobile app backwards compatibility.
  Planned deprecation: Q3 2026.

description: Use TypeScript for all code.
title: Cursor Rules
raw_text: - Always write code in TypeScript.

description: Utilize Tailwind CSS for styling.
title: Cursor Rules
raw_text: - Use Tailwind CSS for all styling.

description: Ensure RTL support for Hebrew speakers.
title: Cursor Rules
raw_text: - RTL support is mandatory — the primary audience is Hebrew speakers.

description: Set the primary color to blue-600 in Tailwind.
title: Design System
raw_text: - Primary color: **#2563EB** (blue-600 in Tailwind).

description: Define the secondary color as violet-600.
title: Design System
raw_text: - Secondary color: **#7C3AED** (violet-600).

description: Use Inter font for Latin and Heebo for Hebrew.
title: Design System
raw_text: - Font: Inter for Latin, Heebo for Hebrew.

description: Maintain a minimum touch target of 44px for buttons.
title: Design System
raw_text: - All buttons must have a minimum touch target of 44px.

description: Utilize PostgreSQL 15 with Prisma ORM.
title: Database
raw_text: - Use PostgreSQL 15 with Prisma ORM.

description: Store all timestamps in UTC.
title: Database
raw_text: - All timestamps must be stored in UTC.

description: Implement a soft-delete pattern with a deleted_at column.
title: Database
raw_text: - Soft-delete pattern: every table has `deleted_at TIMESTAMP`.

description: Follow the clean architecture pattern.
title: Architecture
raw_text: - Follow clean architecture: controllers → services → repositories.

description: Avoid placing business logic within API route handlers.
title: Architecture
raw_text: - Never put business logic inside API route handlers.

description: Migrated duration field from minutes to seconds in the time entries table.
raw_text: - Migrated `duration_minutes` → `duration_seconds` in `time_entries` table.

description: Updated all time-tracking API endpoints to reflect the duration change.
raw_text: - Updated all time-tracking API endpoints.

description: Mobile API v1 temporarily returns duration in seconds and a v1 adapter is added.
raw_text: - **Breaking**: mobile API v1 temporarily returns `duration_seconds`; v1 adapter added.

description: Added a priority field to the Tasks table with four priority levels.
raw_text: - Added `priority` field to Tasks table (ENUM: low / medium / high / critical).

description: Set the default priority for all existing tasks to medium via migration.
raw_text: - Default priority set to `medium` for all existing tasks via migration.

description: Replaced bcrypt with @node-rs/bcrypt for faster hashing without changing the algorithm.
raw_text: - Replaced `bcrypt` with `@node-rs/bcrypt` for 3× faster hashing (same algorithm).

description: Completed a security review with no behaviour change.
raw_text: - Security review completed — no behaviour change.

description: Fixed RTL dropdown menu mirroring issue in Firefox by updating DropdownMenu.tsx.
raw_text: - RTL fix: dropdown menus were mirrored incorrectly in Firefox. Fixed in `DropdownMenu.tsx`.

description: Added dir="rtl" to the root <html> tag permanently.
raw_text: - Added `dir="rtl"` to root `<html>` tag permanently (was being set dynamically).

description: Added an archived_at column to the projects table.
raw_text: - Added `archived_at` column to `projects` table.

description: Shipped the projects archive feature to production.
raw_text: - Projects archive feature shipped to production.

description: Upgraded Stripe integration from v2 to v3 webhooks.
raw_text: - Stripe integration upgraded from v2 to v3 webhooks.

description: Decommissioned the old Stripe v2 webhook endpoint.
raw_text: - Old webhook endpoint `/api/webhooks/stripe-v2` decommissioned.
